from manim import *

class GradientDescent(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        axes = Axes(
            x_range=[-5, 5, 1],
            y_range=[-5, 5, 1],
            x_length=8,
            y_length=6,
            axis_config={"color": GRAY},
        )
        self.play(Create(axes))

        func = lambda x: x**2
        graph = axes.plot(func, color=BLUE)

        self.play(Create(graph))

        dot = Dot(color=ORANGE, radius=0.1)
        dot.move_to(axes.c2p(5, 25))

        self.play(Create(dot))

        t_tracker = ValueTracker(0)
        x_tracker = ValueTracker(5)

        dot = always_redraw(lambda: Dot(
            axes.c2p(x_tracker.get_value(), x_tracker.get_value()**2),
            color=ORANGE, radius=0.1
        ))

        path = TracedPath(
            dot.get_center,
            stroke_color=ORANGE,
            stroke_width=3
        )

        self.add(dot, path)

        self.play(
            x_tracker.animate.set_value(-5),
            run_time=5,
            rate_func=linear
        )
        self.wait(1)
        self.play(*[FadeOut(m) for m in self.mobjects])
